\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5450 introduces Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{H} = \int \left( -mc^2 + \frac{1}{2}\kappa \dot{x}^2 \right) dt \end{equation}
